---
title: "Memory Subpart of BME 306 Study"
date: today
toc: true
autor: "Natallia Halai und Angela Textor"
format: 
  html:
    
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code_fold: true
project:
  
  output_dir: output
  execute_dir: project
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: true
execute: 
  warning: false
  error: false
  freeze: true
---

```{r}
#| label: libraries

library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(DHARMa)
library(GGally)

```

```{r}
#| label: dataset_loading
#| include: false

condition<-read_csv("data/processed/Condition_participants.csv", 
    col_types = cols(participant_id = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", 
        "9")), Condition = col_factor(levels = c("Coffein", 
        "None"))))

all_olt <- read_csv("data/processed/olt_processed/all_olt.csv", 
    col_types = cols(participant = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", 
        "9")), timepoint = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2")), file = col_skip()))

all_olt_min <- read_csv("data/processed/all_olt_min.csv", 
    col_types = cols(participant = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", 
        "9")), timepoint = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2")), file = col_skip()))


condition<-condition%>%
  rename(participant="participant_id")

all_olt$condition<-rep(condition$Condition, each=2)
all_olt_min$condition<-rep(condition$Condition, each=2)

```

::: {comment_to_self}
-\> timepoint 2 score under 0.6 -\> time to answer correct??? definition -\> how many memory pairs were there -\> where is the 3rd patients EEG -\> want to see the improvement in memory with increased N3 phase
:::

```{r}

#For max 
ggpairs(all_olt)
hist(all_olt$percent_correct)
hist(all_olt$time_for_answer_correct)

#For min 
ggpairs(all_olt_min)
hist(all_olt_min$percent_correct)
hist(all_olt_min$time_for_answer_correct)


```

```{r}

#Plots for max 
ggplot(all_olt, aes(x=timepoint, y=percent_correct))+
  geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE)+
  geom_point(aes(color=participant), position=position_jitter(width=0.2, seed=123)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = participant, color = participant), position=position_jitter(width=0.2, seed=123))+
  labs(x="Timepoint of Data Acquisition", y="Percent of Correct Guesses")+
    theme_light()


ggplot(all_olt, aes(x=timepoint, y=percent_correct))+
  geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE)+
  geom_point(aes(color=condition), position=position_jitter(width=0.2, seed=123))+ #position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.2)
  geom_line(aes(group = participant, color=condition), position=position_jitter(width=0.2, seed=123)) +
  labs(x="Timepoint of Data Acquisition", y="Percent of Correct Guesses")+
    theme_light()


#Plots for min
ggplot(all_olt_min, aes(x=timepoint, y=percent_correct))+
  geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE)+
  geom_point(aes(color=participant), position=position_jitter(width=0.2, seed=123)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = participant, color = participant), position=position_jitter(width=0.2, seed=123))+
  labs(x="Timepoint of Data Aquisition", y="Percent of Correct Guesses")+
    theme_light()


ggplot(all_olt_min, aes(x=timepoint, y=percent_correct))+
  geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE)+
  geom_point(aes(color=condition), position=position_jitter(width=0.2, seed=123))+ #position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.2)
  geom_line(aes(group = participant, color=condition), position=position_jitter(width=0.2, seed=123)) +
  labs(x="Timepoint of Data Aquisition", y="Percent of Correct Guesses")+
    theme_light()




# t-test takes differences (e.g. group 2 - 1) FOR MAX
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
all_olt_new <- all_olt %>% 
  select(-time_for_answer_correct)



all_olt_wide <- all_olt_new %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = percent_correct) 

all_olt_wide %>% 
  group_by(participant) %>% 
  reframe(extra_diff = `2`-`1`,
          x = factor(0)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = extra_diff, x = x)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red") +
  geom_point(aes(color = participant), size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "Response difference group 2-1"
  )

t.test(all_olt_wide$`1`, all_olt_wide$`2`, paired=TRUE)
#no statistically significant difference -> also not in boxplots
#p-value = 0.4028



# t-test takes differences (e.g. group 2 - 1) FOR MIN
all_olt_min_new <- all_olt_min %>% 
  select(-time_for_answer_correct)



all_olt_min_wide <- all_olt_min_new %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = percent_correct) 

all_olt_min_wide %>% 
  group_by(participant) %>% 
  reframe(extra_diff = `2`-`1`,
          x = factor(0)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = extra_diff, x = x)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red") +
  geom_point(aes(color = participant), size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "Response difference group 2-1"
  )

t.test(all_olt_min_wide$`1`, all_olt_min_wide$`2`, paired=TRUE)
#p-value = 0.2016



```

# Script for data extraction:

```{r}
# Get all csv OLT files
files <- list.files(
  "data/raw/OLT_Data/",
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE
)


library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

all_data <- lapply(files, function(f) {

  # get info
  parts <- str_split(f, .Platform$file.sep)[[1]]
  
  participant <- strsplit(parts[grepl("Participant_", parts)], "_")[[1]][2]
  timepoint   <- strsplit(parts[grepl("Session_", parts)], "_")[[1]][2]
  filename    <- tail(parts, 1)
  
  
  oltd <- read.csv(f)
  minrounds <- min(oltd$cued_recall_round,na.rm = T)
  olt_info <- oltd %>% 
    filter(cued_recall_round %in% minrounds) %>% 
    summarize(percent_correct = sum(answer)/length(answer),
              time_for_answer_correct = mean(time_for_answer[answer == 1]))
  
  olt_info$participant = participant
  olt_info$timepoint = timepoint
  olt_info$file = filename
  
  olt_info
})
all_data <- do.call(rbind, all_data)
write.csv(all_data,
          file = "data/processed/all_olt_min.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}

```
